title: rootless podman cant bind mount a volume file.
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

bind mounting a single file with -v throws a go error.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. mount a single file during podman run (-v configuration.py:/etc/config/configuration.py )

2.

3.

**Describe the results you received:**
error in container_linux.go

Error: container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:449: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"/home/cicero/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes/configuration.py/_data\\\" to rootfs \\\"/home/cicero/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs/dir/aa48a7a30b304bdba9fbf100c4667454685306e6d2f52ec6f90b08b1a8e8c567\\\" at \\\"/home/cicero/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs/dir/aa48a7a30b304bdba9fbf100c4667454685306e6d2f52ec6f90b08b1a8e8c567/etc/netbox/config/configuration.py\\\" caused \\\"not a directory\\\"\"": OCI runtime error

**Describe the results you expected:**
file bind mounted properly.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**
Version:            1.7.0
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.5
Git Commit:         b7ce1157b00af09f4a09e39b377aa3abff46ee05-dirty
Built:              Sat Jan 11 04:49:39 2020
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```
(paste your output here)
```

comments.body:
You need to make the file a relative path by saying ./ in front of it;
otherwise, we assume it's the name of a named volume. I would expect that
to work, and not will, though. Given that, I think we have a definite bug
in the handling of the named volume, and a case we should document better
(everything passed to -v that is not an absolute or relative path will be
assumed to be the name of a named volume).

 podman run --pod netbox-pod -v ./configuration.py:/etc/netbox/config/ netboxcommunity/netbox:v2.7.4
Error: container_linux.go:349: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:449: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"/home/cicero/netbox-dev/netbox/netbox/netbox/netconfig_01/configuration.py\\\" to rootfs \\\"/home/cicero/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs/dir/420de5979ea542e15a9285dea7024f0fb1179c75db4fbe445060bb63ff0de82a\\\" at \\\"/home/cicero/.local/share/containers/storage/vfs/dir/420de5979ea542e15a9285dea7024f0fb1179c75db4fbe445060bb63ff0de82a/etc/netbox/config\\\" caused \\\"not a directory\\\"\"": OCI runtime error

Alright, that's probably the same error we saw with the named volume. I'll
take a look on Monday.

Can you try to fully path it?

-v $PWD/...
I can't replicate this on Fedora 30 or 31, runc or crun, with latest Podman (1.8.0). Any chance you can retest with 1.8.0 and see if the problem is resolved?
upgraded to latest 1.8 on Arch and the issue is no longer seen in debug or my CI.
